name: The Grounds X Siam Cookies
note: Trendy café-restaurant with amazing cookies and good eats. A lovely chill-out spot! 😋

name: LE Burger Shack
note: Very good burgers! Our absolute fave: La-French with an extra fried egg. Trust us on this one! 🤤

name: La Ceviche's
note: Fresh, vibrant ceviche bar — a taste of the ocean on every plate! 🌊

name: HarborHouse
note: Great Thai street food right by the harbor. Authentic, delicious, and oh-so-satisfying!

name: Fabio's Restaurant
note: Wonderful Italian food on the island. Mama mia good! 🇮🇹

name: Prime Cafe
note: A local favorite for good eats and great coffee. Your go-to all-day spot!

name: Umami Ramen & Sushi
note: Craving Japan? Fresh sushi and soul-warming ramen — island-style! 🥢

name: Peppercorn
note: Amazing steaks! If you love a great cut of meat, this is THE place. Don't miss it! 🔥

name: House of Sanskara
note: Haad Rin gem! Must-try: Panang curry with rice + Num-Tok Schnitzel. You'll thank us later! 🤤

name: Wasabi Haad Son
note: Japanese flavors in a gorgeous setting. Because island life deserves good sushi! 🌸

name: Vertigo Resto Bar
note: Amazing Italian food! Our obsession: Burrata & Anchovies Pizza. Order it. You'll understand. ✨

name: Tomorrow X
note: Cool spot for good food and island vibes. Great for groups — the energy here is special!

name: YUMMY — Thai Food
note: The name says it all! Authentic Thai flavors that'll have you coming back for more! 🌶️

name: Pum Pui Restaurant
note: Solid Thai cooking in a lovely local setting. Great value, great taste!

name: LEO Thai Food
note: Local Thai favorites up in the north. Simple, fresh, and absolutely delicious!

name: Mama Rocky's
note: Mama Rocky knows how to do it right — great food AND cocktails. The double win! 🏆

name: Sirtaki Taverna
note: Authentic Greek flavors on the island! A lovely change of pace — opa! 🍋

name: Alcove Restaurant & Bar
note: Perfect from sunset drinks through the night. Amazing vibe, great music — this place has soul! ✨

name: Eden Garden
note: Party every Saturday night going until sunrise! Needs a taxi boat from Haad Rin — check with us if it's on! 🌙

name: El Barrio Koh Phangan
note: Great bar with Latin vibes and tropical cocktails. ¡Salud! 🥂

name: Seaboard Bungalows
note: Party every Wednesday from 17:00 until midnight! Great music and beachside energy! 🎶

name: Hollystone
note: Saturday night party central! Usually free entrance before 9pm — get there early! 🎊

name: Charlie's
note: A classic Koh Phangan hang-out. Cold drinks, great company, pure island life! 🌴

name: Bluerama
note: Chilled beach-side bar with great drinks and even better vibes! Your sunset HQ! 🌅

name: Lonely Beach
note: Beautiful and serene — steps from Sitaya! Your home beach. You already know how gorgeous it is! 😍

name: Bottle Beach
note: Amazing hidden gem! Taxi boat from Chalok Lam (10-15 min) or a 1.5-hr hike. Worth every step! 🚤

name: Secret Beach
note: Shh — it's a secret! Magical calm waters and stunning views. Just… wow.

name: Thong Nai Pan Beach
note: One of the most beautiful beaches on the island. Crystal clear waters, lush surroundings! 😮

name: Thong Nai Pan Yai
note: Thong Nai Pan's bigger sister — equally stunning with even more beach to explore!

name: Haad Rin Beach
note: THE Full Moon Party beach! Even without the party — gorgeous sand and great beach restaurants!

name: Malibu Beach
note: Quiet gem with great snorkeling. Bring your mask and fins — the fish are waiting! 🐠

name: Ko Ma Beach
note: Connected to a tiny island by a sandbar! Postcard-perfect with incredible snorkeling!

name: Indigo Specialty Coffee & Bakery
note: Coffee that would make a Melbourne barista jealous. Incredible baked goods too! ☕🥐

name: Indigo Cafe & Eatery Thongsala
note: The Thongsala outpost of the beloved Indigo brand. Coffee + bites before exploring town!

name: Bubba's Thong Sala
note: Breakfast champions! Hearty plates, great smoothies, and totally cozy vibes. Start your day right!

name: Sage — Breakfast and More
note: Fresh, clean, and thoughtful. Love the healthy options and beautiful presentation! 🌱

name: Young Son Cafe
note: Charming café with excellent coffee and a laidback island atmosphere. Perfect mid-ride stop!

name: Balance Specialty Coffee
note: Perfectly balanced, as all things should be! Serious specialty coffee in a beautiful setting. ✨

name: What's Cup!
note: Cute and trendy café in the north! Great drinks and a lovely spot to chill!

name: Kaif Deli & Restaurant
note: Deli + café = the perfect combo! Great for breakfast, lunch, or a quality coffee break!

name: Alfa Coffee Roaster
note: Serious roasters who care deeply about their craft. For true coffee connoisseurs! 🏆

name: Hundred Islands Coffee Bar
note: Island-inspired coffee with views to match! Great stop when exploring the south!

name: Scene Nymph
note: Dreamy, aesthetic café in the north. Gram-worthy coffee and even better vibes! 📸

name: Xantiva Gym
note: Top-notch gym facilities on the island. Stay fit even in paradise — no excuses! 🏋️

name: Podium Gym CrossFit
note: CrossFit intensity meets island energy. Great community, great coaches — you'll love it!

name: Bandana Studio — Ceramic & Craft
note: Make your own island souvenir! Beautiful ceramic and art studio — the perfect creative afternoon!

name: ATV Station by Speed
note: Explore the jungle by ATV! An absolute blast — adventure seekers, this is for you! 🌿

name: Martial Arts Academy — Muay Thai
note: Train like a local! Great group or private Muay Thai lessons — an unforgettable island experience!

name: Casa Luma — For Young Kids
note: The little ones deserve fun too! Great indoor play space for families! 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦

name: CoCo Family Play Center
note: Family-friendly fun for kids of all ages! Perfect for a morning of play and big smiles! 😄

name: Kanda Massage
note: Excellent traditional Thai massage. Skilled therapists, great value — your muscles will thank you! 🙏

name: Pure Relax Massage & Spa
note: Heavenly massages in a serene spa setting. You've earned it — pure relaxation awaits! 🌺
